content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Apex Logistics Co.
Customer ID: C002
Contract ID: K014
Account Executive: James Okafor
Deal Type: Renewal + Upgrade
Date: January 15, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Apex Logistics and upgraded from DataSync Pro Starter to Enterprise, expanding from 10 to 50 users. No discount applied. New ARR: $45,000.

RENEWAL NOTES
The upgrade was driven by Apex's decision to roll out DataSync Pro to all six regional offices. Brian Calloway championed the expansion internally after positive feedback from the central operations team in their first year.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
Brian raised concerns about the per-user cost at scale during the renewal call in December 2023. James Okafor addressed this by demonstrating that the Enterprise tier's lower per-user rate ($75 vs $50 Starter) provided better long-term value at their new user count. No discount was needed once the math was clear.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
With 50 users across 6 offices, account is well-penetrated. Monitor for potential addition of external partner users (freight brokers) which Brian mentioned as a possible future use case.
